B1: Google Maps and New Feature That Uses Artificial

Source topic: You can now ask Google Maps ‘complex, real-world questions’ — and Gemini will answer

Google is continuing to weave Gemini into the firmament of its most-used products. Today, it announced that Google Maps was getting a new AI-powered Ask Maps feature that allows...
